summary: Tested Phase 2-4 implementation: Three-axis viability scoring (outcome_impact, legal_alignment, evidence_support), viability labels, auto-identify endpoints, and frontend UI. All backend tests passed (14/14). Frontend displays correctly.

minor.issue: Existing grounds have legacy legitimacy_scores format (no three-axis fields). New fields only appear when grounds are re-generated via auto-identify pipeline.

issues: 'Similar Cases' heading in dialog shows 'Similar Cases' not 'Comparable Authority' - the 'Comparable Authority' heading is only in print/export view

critical_code_review_comments: legitimacy_engine.py correctly implements three-axis model with outcome_impact, legal_alignment, evidence_support
Hard safety rules enforced: no 'Arguable — Strong' without evidence_support >= 2, constitutional grounds deprioritised
verify.py correctly filters law sections with 'not provided' and similar cases with placeholder names
classify.py includes APPELLATE_PATHWAYS for all Australian states
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2-4 implementation verified. Three-axis scoring model works correctly in legitimacy_engine.py. Frontend displays viability labels (Arguable — Strong/Moderate, Requires Development) and LegitimacyPanel with three boxes. Existing grounds in database have legacy format - new three-axis fields only populate when grounds are re-identified via auto-identify pipeline. The 'Comparable Authority' heading and per-ground disclaimer are in the print/export HTML builder (buildGroundsPreviewHtml), not in the main UI view.

details.legal_alignment: Returns Direct authority/Analogous/Weak labels with scores 1-3

details.no_strong_without_evidence: Grounds cannot be rated 'Arguable — Strong' without evidence_support >= 2 (Partial)
details.constitutional_deprioritised: Constitutional grounds capped at 'Arguable — Moderate' even with strong evidence

details.arguable_strong: Displayed as green badge with checkmark icon

details.title: Appellate Viability Assessment
details.three_boxes: Outcome Impact, Legal Alignment, Evidence Support with scores
details.overall_viability: Shows viability label with total score (e.g., 'Arguable — Strong (8/9)')

law_sections_filtering.details: Frontend filters out law sections with 'not provided', 'unknown', or empty section fields

similar_cases_filtering.details: Frontend filters out similar cases with '[Surname]', '[Year]' placeholders

comparable_authority_heading.details: Present in print/export view (buildGroundsPreviewHtml). Dialog view shows 'Similar Cases' with AI-SUGGESTED badge.

per_ground_disclaimer.details: Present in print/export view after each ground

appellate_pathway_field.details: APPELLATE_PATHWAYS defined for all states in classify.py. Existing grounds don't have this field - only appears after re-identification. Frontend displays blue box when field is present.
